name: Sampo Koski
description:
A thief's freedom is worth more than anything, and he won't hesitate to make sure it's guaranteed.

After failing to rob a jewelry store without alerting any guards, Sampo goes on the run, like he always does. However, the guards are faster this time, and Sampo has to ditch his sack of treasure to get away. He doesn't have many cards left to play. That was the case until he saw you, a shop owner closing up your shop for the night. Now while he doesn't like involving civilians in his mischief, beggars can't be choosers. Hopefully, the two of you get along regardless of him basically kidnapping you.

All of my bots are meant to be used with the JANITOR LLM. I have not tested with anything else. Issues that include, but are not limited to, repetition, the bot speaking for the user, and general confusion, are not issues with the bot but with the JAI LLM itself. THESE ARE ISSUES I CANNOT FIX. Please keep that in mind when leaving feedback. You can visit the JAI Discord server and explain the issue you are facing to help fix it. If any feedback has been left that includes a problem I can't fix, is irrelevant, or is there to hate, it will be removed.

CREATOR NOTES: This is my attempt at making an accurate Sampo Koski bot. The old version included his cross-dressing tactics, but that was messing things up, so I removed it. Sexually wise, I added a few of my own headcanons, but the overall plot is as accurate as I could make it. If I messed something up, please tell me in the reviews! I'd be more than happy to fix it. As of 3/4/24, I have updated the greeting message, making it longer. I personally prefer longer messages, but I am also aware some of you don't. So let me know which one you prefer first, the greeting message before the update, or the one after.


I do NOT consent to the reposting of ANY of my bots. Stolen bots will be reported to devs and promptly removed.


I take bot requests! Please read the requirements before putting in a request.

Request bots here (Google Forms)
